commit.message: Fixed up mqtt content so it uses npm package. Added npm packages resource and confetti library activity.
Added animations and a noscript message.
Added the qualification name to the portal site heading.
Added an ai tools site for ai prompting and agents.
Add a version control site for diploma.
Add additional script and fix invalid method.
Add test script for original board.
Added simple module and updated README.
The server now only accepts one connection and drops dead connections.
Remapped RX/TX pins to correct pins.
Added custom ATOM firmware following feetech protocol.
Attempt to fix arm movement failure reports.
Made the client an interactive menu.
Updated agents.md and removed answers from mkdoc site tasks.
Get rid of extra matrix values.
Apply matrix to all input for testing.
Only use root for install for weston.
Added weston.ini config and setup claibration script.
I am dumb ignore the last commit.
Added required dependencies for headless rendering.
Added sudo requirements and input to reboot.
Got rid of non-existent switch and added kiosk shell back.
